name: currency-reference
description: R3 CurrencyService reference server — the currency_suite ground-truth oracle + the M1 fleet's currency backend (Convert + GetSupportedCurrencies over the co-located demo.proto). ADVISORY ONLY: the build context's node_modules closure + demo.proto are staged by fleet.containerize._stage_node_context (execute.prepare_node_workdir), NOT installed from this manifest — the vendored closure is authoritative.
